text:
ToyLand (トイ・ランド, Toi Rando) is a database website related to toys and games in the world of Hunter × Hunter. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 69 

Overview

The website has information on various toy stores, game shops, and their inventory. It gives the user a list of the nearest stores with the item searched for and its associated reviews. The site also apparently sells or mediates the purchase with other stores. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

Killua ordered a JoyStation Console using the ToyLand website and unsuccessfully attempted to get a copy of Greed Island. 

References
